scores.correctness_notes: The response explains all the right concepts (services, checks, log-targets, on-check-failure, environment vars) with correct field names and values, but critically fails to deliver what was asked: a complete Pebble layer YAML. The answer is entirely in table/prose/Python-snippet form with no top-level YAML document. The facts themselves are accurate — `on-failure`, `on-check-failure`, `level: alive/ready`, `threshold`, `labels` etc. are all correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all referenced fields (on-failure, on-check-failure, user/group, level, threshold, headers, labels) are real Pebble layer specification fields
